title: Munchkin Dandy Dots Non Slip Baby Bath Mat | Colourful Bubble Shower Mat | Bathmat with Skid-Resistant Suction Cups |Baby Essential Children's Bath Accessories
features: MUNCHKIN NON SLIP MAT FOR THE BATH: This colourful non slip bath mat, for inside baths and showers, provides a safe way for your little one to get into and out of the tub
STAYS IN PLACE: Powerful, slip-resistant suction cups hold the bath mat in position, making it an essential baby bathroom accessory for toddlers through to older children and adults
ANTI SLIP SURFACE: These handy anti slip bath mats feature a textured grip surface, and are designed to fit most bathtubs or shower trays. Measures L77 x W36cm
COLOURFUL DOTTY DESIGN: Made from strong, durable plastic, this bright Munchkin bath mat features a cute and colourful dot design, adding a fun splash of colour to your bathroom
PART OF THE MUNCHKIN BATHTIME RANGE: Innovative baby bath time products, baby toys and washing essentials such as bathmats, shampoo rinsers and toy storage - all designed with your little one in mind
description: Product Description Get a grip with our Munchkin Dandy Dots non-slip skid resistant baby and toddler bath mat! Munchkin knows when it comes to bath time, safety comes first and anything we can do to prevent slipping/create an anti-slip surface, we will! That’s why we created our spotty bath mats. Non slip, with a fun colourful design, the mat has a textured surface that keeps your little one from slipping or sliding while the powerful suction cups keep the mat securely in place. Plus, it’s as cute as a button - just like your little one! Part of the innovative Munchkin baby bath toys, bath toy storage and baby bath accessories range. • Munchkin Dandy Dots Non Slip Bath Mat • Colourful anti slip bath mats for inside bath or shower • For babies and toddler through to older children and adults • Anti-slip textured surface • Powerful skid-resistant suction cups hold mat in place • Cute and colourful dot design • Bath mat measures (LxW): 77 x 36cm It's the little things: Munchkin are an award-winning baby brand. Discover our baby products and toddler accessories, including baby weaning products, sippy cups, bath toys, stair gates, bouncers and more, all designed to make parents' lives easier and more enjoyable. Safety Warning Warning! For your child's safety and health. Always use caution when bathing or showering. To prevent drowning keep children within arm's reach. Inspect before use. Discard and replace at the first sign of weakness or damage. Always check temperature of water before placing child in bath. This product should be used under adult supervision only. Do not leave child unattended. Do not use with bath oils or other additives that may make the mat surface slippy. When stepping on mat, tread carefully on to the center. Store away from direct sunlight. At the end of life do not burn, please recycle where facilities exist. Please read and retain this information for future reference. Remove all packaging components before use. This is not a toy. Wash the mat periodically by hand in warm soapy water. Avoid contact with direct heat sources such as radiators. Indoor use only. Do not use on uneven or textured surface. Colours and styles may vary. Box Contains 1 x Dandy Dots Bath Mat Manufacturer Contact Information Hornbeam Square West Hornbeam Park Harrogate Hg2 8Pa See more
